summary: Full QA audit of 'The Program' fitness app. All pages tested systematically: Auth, Home, Today, Schedule, Track, Tools, Settings, Check-In, Change Log, Current Block. 3 terminology bugs found and fixed.

bugs_fixed.issue: 'Deload recommended immediately' in RECOVERY WEEK RECOMMENDED card body text on Home page
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to 'Recovery week recommended immediately. Clear signs of systemic overreaching.'

bugs_fixed.issue: 'Consider a deload within 1–2 weeks' in fatigue warning message
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to 'Consider a recovery week within 1–2 weeks'

bugs_fixed.issue: SESSIONS array and KEY_EXERCISES had 'ME Upper', 'ME Lower', 'DE Upper', 'DE Lower' labels (Max Effort/Dynamic Effort abbreviations)
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to 'Heavy Upper', 'Heavy Lower', 'Speed Upper', 'Speed Lower'

bugs_fixed.issue: 'Max effort variations rotate weekly' and 'Dynamic effort loads increase 5%' in 'How This Block Progresses' descriptive text
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to 'Heavy session variations rotate weekly' and 'Speed session loads increase 5%'

pages_audit.auth_screen: PASS — TP logo on dark background, 'Continue with Email' button visible, Google/Facebook marked as 'Soon'
pages_audit.auth_login_form: PASS — Sign In form loads, email/password inputs work
pages_audit.auth_login_success: PASS — Login with user_a@theprogram.app/StrongmanA123 succeeds, redirects to Home tab
pages_audit.home_greeting: PASS — Shows 'Good evening, User Alpha' (user's name, not 'Athlete')
pages_audit.home_session_card: PASS — 'Heavy Lower' session type badge visible
pages_audit.home_stats_strip: PASS — SESSIONS / AVG EFFORT (not AVG RPE) / COMPLETION shown
pages_audit.home_est_maxes: PASS — EST. MAXES section visible (not 'E1RMs') with Squat/Press/Pull
pages_audit.home_quick_actions: PASS — All 4 visible: Log Session, Coach, Check-In, Change Log
pages_audit.home_no_forbidden_text: FIXED — 'Deload recommended' was present in RECOVERY WEEK card, now fixed
pages_audit.today_category_badges: PASS — Primary/Support/Accessory/Injury Prevention (no Max Effort/Dynamic Effort/Supplemental/Prehab)
pages_audit.today_action_pills: PASS — Swap, Pain, Add Set, Remove set all visible
pages_audit.today_no_forbidden: PASS — No Max Effort/Dynamic Effort visible in today tab
pages_audit.schedule_calendar_grid: PASS — Weekly grid with days visible
pages_audit.schedule_session_history: PASS — Cards with 'Not logged' amber label + chevron for missed sessions
pages_audit.track_tab: PASS — Loads without errors (minimal content shown)
pages_audit.tools_tab: PASS — 8 tools accessible including Pocket Coach, Weekly Check-In, Change Log, Workout Calendar
pages_audit.tools_no_program_roadmap: NOTE — 'Program Roadmap' not in tools list; current-block page accessible at /current-block
pages_audit.checkin_recovery_week: PASS — Shows 'Recovery Week: No' not 'Deload Week'
pages_audit.settings_profile: PASS — Name, email, goal/experience/weight badges visible
pages_audit.settings_recovery_alert: PASS — 'Recovery week alert' shown (not 'Deload Week Alert')
pages_audit.settings_account: PASS — Reset program + Sign out visible
pages_audit.current_block_session_labels: FIXED — Was showing ME Upper/ME Lower/DE Upper/DE Lower, now shows Heavy Upper/Heavy Lower/Speed Upper/Speed Lower
pages_audit.current_block_descriptive_text: FIXED — Was 'Max effort variations rotate weekly...' now 'Heavy session variations rotate weekly...'

action_items: INFO: 'Program Roadmap' tool not present in Tools tab — current-block page accessible at /current-block but not listed. Main agent should add it to tools list if required.
INFO: Settings profile shows 'General Fitness / Beginner' for user_a instead of 'Strongman / Advanced' — may be a seed data mismatch.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data (POST /api/seed returned 'already seeded')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All terminology issues fixed: (1) current-block.tsx now uses Heavy/Speed instead of ME/DE labels; (2) backend deload messages use 'recovery week' terminology; (3) All other pages pass terminology checks. Remaining: Program Roadmap not in Tools list.
